name: Household Ammonia (5–10%)
description: A powerful alkaline cleaner that saponifies grease and denatures proteins, effective on organic stains but requiring careful handling.
appearance: Clear, colorless liquid with intensely pungent, characteristic odor
solubility: Fully miscible with water in all proportions
chemistry: Alkaline (pH ~11–12). Saponifies grease. Excels on protein stains — denatures proteins (blood, sweat, food). Softens water. Standard pre-commercial laundry agent.
warnings: NEVER with bleach (toxic chloramine gas). Harsh fumes — ventilate. Destroys wool/silk. Fades dyes. Pair with soap.
